concept: 200-day SMA regime filter: hold long when daily close > SMA200, exit to cash when below SMA200*0.97 — avoids deep bear markets while staying mostly in-market during bull phases
name: DailyMaRegime

concept: Per-asset 20-week SMA gate filters out assets in downtrends, then 4-week cross-sectional momentum rotation allocates to top 2 of qualifying assets. Always in-market (either in top-2 assets or cash if all below MA). Bear protection: all assets go below MA in systematic bear → cash; bull: concentrated in momentum leaders.
name: MaGatedRotation

concept: Volatility-targeted position sizing on MaGatedRotation: replace fixed 5k/position with EWMA vol targeting (target_vol=0.30, halflife=20d) to reduce risk during high-vol regimes while maintaining near-full capital deployment in low-vol regimes. Exploits vol clustering (ACF=0.985) in crypto assets.
name: MaGatedRotationVolScaled

concept: Replace 4-week raw return ranking with Sharpe-normalized score (4w_return / max(stdev_4w_weekly_returns, 0.02)). Selects assets with more persistent, low-noise trends. Reduces exposure to high-vol altcoins in choppy markets while concentrating in smoother-trending assets. SMA gate unchanged for bear protection.
name: SharpeNormalizedMomentum

concept: Dynamic rebalance cadence driven by short_vol/long_vol ratio: 1w when cross-asset realized vol is calm (ratio < 1.3), 2w max when elevated. Built on SharpeRank framework (Sharpe-normalized ranking, 20w SMA gate, hold_count=2). Tests whether adaptive cadence captures best-of-both (weekly compounding in trends, churn reduction in chop) vs fixed 2w.
name: VolRegimeCadence

concept: Replace vol-ratio cadence discriminator with cross-asset momentum-alignment count: >=4 of 6 assets with positive 4w return triggers 1w rebalance (aligned bull); <4 triggers 3w rebalance (fragmented/choppy). Fixes the structural flaw of VolRegimeCadence where vol level cannot distinguish trending-calm from ranging-calm. Built on SharpeRank framework.
name: MomentumAlignedCadence
